title: LANDFIRE R Demos
text: These LANDFIRE-Powered Landscape Assessments allow users to start exploring trends, landscape conversion and natural resource management options.

title: LANDFIRE R Demos
section: How to use this web report
text:
How to use this web report

All maps, input datasets and further assistance can be obtained by contacting the author, Randy Swaty.
Review is ongoing.
To share this web app, simply share the hyperlink.
Toggle between dark and light display of this site in the upper right corner of the page.
Learn more about LANDFIRE and The Nature Conservancy here.

title: Biophysical Settings (BpS) Data
text:
Skills learned

Download LANDFIRE Biophysical Settings (BpS) data, manage and load into R
Crop, mask and build attribute table for the area
Make a simple bar chart of the top BpSs
Make an interactive hexbin map
